examples: Optical discs are made of polycarbonate that comes in large bags.
The plastic that used to be used to make baby bottles is a polycarbonate.
The polycarbonate windscreens can withstand the impact of birds, so they won't fracture.
It's already marketing a polycarbonate for optical media like CD-ROMs that can shorten customers' production cycles.
At elevated temperatures, the BPA in polycarbonate will leach out over 50 times faster.
